title: Shulell City

'''Shulell City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Lan Barell/Legends|Lan Barell]]. The only [[Human/Legends|Human]]-style settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it boasted a population of over 100,000 Humans and at least 30,000 [[Qieg/Legends|Qieg]]. Shulell City was constructed as part of the agreement that allowed Human colonization of the planet after Lan Barell was discovered by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] around [[1300 BBY/Legends|1300 BBY]]. A mixture of Human and Qieg structures, most were constructed of [[Plasteel/Legends|plasteel]] and adobe, as well as the more traditional cacti hives employed by the Qieg. Large sections of the city were devoted to industrial ventures, and the only modern [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the planet was located in Shulell City. The [[Shulell City spaceport]] offered comprehensive services and a small [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] that was in constant use as [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] and [[Transport/Legends|transports]] arrived and departed. An [[Shulell City airport|airport]] was located in the north of the city that dealt exclusively with the sub-[[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] traffic bringing in materials and [[dingory]] meat from the rest of the planet.

In the center of the city is the [[Quilan Hive]]. One the largest Qieg cacti hive in the planet, by the Galactic Civil War it served as the governmental, financial and commercial center of the entire [[Lan system]]. All deals concerning the sale of ores and materials was conducted through the Hive.

[[The Grill]] was an area of the city where those escaping from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] hid due to Lan Barell's lax approach to law enforcement. A mixture of slums, businesses, plazas, and cacti gardens, the Grill was the place to go for illegal goods and services. Political refugees and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] inhabit the Grill, and a small [[Rebel cell (Lan Barell)|Rebel cell]] operates in the area.

==Behind the scenes==
Shulell was incorrectly spelt "Shullel" in the ''[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]'' in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]].
